name: Potato Salad with Pomegranate
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the new potatoes until tender, then peel and dice them.
2. In a large bowl, mix together 250 mL plain yogurt (using a thick low-fat version to reduce kilojoules), 2 finely chopped coriander leaves, salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Add the diced potatoes to the bowl and gently fold through the dressing.
4. Transfer the salad to a serving dish and scatter the seeds of 1 pomegranate over the top.
